title: Velvety Canadian Farfalle Pasta
description: A low-calorie-friendly date-night dish featuring fresh farfalle pasta, perfectly cooked and seasoned with a creamy sauce for that velvety texture.

ingredients.name: Gently Cooked Shrimp or Chicken Slices

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add farfalle pasta and cook until al dente.
In another pan, heat the creamy Alfredo sauce over medium heat. Stir in freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
Meanwhile, sauté the shrimp or chicken slices with some olive oil until just cooked through.
Combine cooked farfalle pasta with the creamy Alfredo sauce and gently warm it all together. Add chopped fresh spinach to the mix, ensuring it doesn't overcook and turns bright green.
Toss in the sautéed shrimp or chicken pieces, garnish with dill sprigs, and serve immediately.
